description_long: This is a single-story detached house set within a walled yard, featuring a gable roof with gray shingles and white exterior walls. The property includes a driveway leading to a parking area, a small front porch with steps, and a landscaped garden with shrubs, trees, and a patio area furnished with a table and chairs. The house has multiple windows with brown trim, and the main entrance is accentuated by a small overhang. The backyard is enclosed by fencing and contains additional greenery and a barbecue area. The overall layout is rectangular, with the house centrally positioned and surrounded by well-maintained lawns and pathways.
description: A single-story house with a gable roof, white walls, brown-trimmed windows, and a landscaped yard with a driveway, patio, and garden features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, front porch, driveway, and a large section of the landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the patio area with outdoor furniture, the driveway, and the rear garden space.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, barbecue area, and the back facade of the house with additional greenery.
description_view_3: Side/rear view showing the driveway entrance, garage area, and the side garden with shrubs and trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with evenly spaced rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, overhang, and a single front door accented by brown trim.
